author: mark
text: Bump actions/checkout from v4 to v5 in ci.yml and release-plz.yml to move onto Node 24 and clear the Node 20 deprecation warning GitHub started emitting 2025-09-19. Other actions (rust-cache, install-action, release-plz) weren't flagged — leaving them until their own notices land. Zero code changes; pre-commit green (100% coverage, clippy clean, line limits clean).
